title: Parsa Venkateshwar Rao Jr | Trump & Bibi: Diminishing Dividends Of Belligerence…
description: Hamas’ political leader Ismael Haniyeh was killed in an Israel bombing in Tehran in July 31, 2024. On September 9, 2025, Hamas negotiators were killed in an air attack in Doha though the chief negotiator Khalil al-Hayya survived
